meaning: [域] Paname ,巴拿马;  私人助理 PA(personal assistant)
examples: Pa, I wish you wouldn't shout.
I used to know your pa.
Pa looked at the drawing again.
Several years ago, would-be creditors filed an involuntary bankruptcy against Richard Chakejian of Chester Springs, Pa.
To our interview he brought an old wooden driver from his workshop in Latrobe, Pa.
